description: Federal civil complaint with caption, parties, counsel, claims, and jury demand
parsed_text:
UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE SOUTHERN DISTRICT OF NEW YORK
Apex Supply Co., Plaintiff, v. Meridian Bank, N.A., Defendant.
Case No. 1:26-cv-04812-LTS
COMPLAINT AND JURY DEMAND
Filed: March 4, 2026
Plaintiff Apex Supply Co. brings this complaint for breach of contract, fraudulent misrepresentation, and unjust enrichment. The Court has diversity jurisdiction under 28 U.S.C. 1332. Plaintiff seeks damages in excess of $8,500,000, costs, interest, and such other relief as the Court deems just. Plaintiff demands a trial by jury. Attorney for Plaintiff: Rachel Kim, Kim & Avery LLP, NY Bar No. 512334, rkim@kimavery.example. Judge Laura Taylor Swain.
